name: libmail-sendmail-perl
title: libmail-sendmail-perl
summary: simple way to send email from a perl script
description:
simple way to send email from a perl script
Mail::Sendmail is intended to be a very simple and easy-to-setup and
easy-to-use platform-independent e-mail module. It only requires Perl 5,
Sys::Hostname::Long, and a network connection.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmail-sendmail-perl because simple way to send email from a perl script.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmail-sendmail-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmail-sendmail-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmail-sendmail-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
